note: The top-level execute() function was removed in Qiskit 1.0. Transpile first, then run on a backend: transpiled = transpile(circuit, backend); job = backend.run(transpiled). For expectation values / sampling prefer the Sampler/Estimator primitives.
qiskit.BasicAer was removed in 1.0. Use BasicSimulator from qiskit.providers.basic_provider, or AerSimulator from the qiskit-aer package.
The basicaer module was removed in 1.0; replaced by qiskit.providers.basic_provider.
bind_parameters was removed in 1.0. Use assign_parameters() as a drop-in replacement (it also supports inplace and additional features).
Aer is no longer re-exported from qiskit. Install qiskit-aer and import from qiskit_aer: from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator (or Aer).
qiskit.opflow was removed in 1.0. Use qiskit.quantum_info (SparsePauliOp, Statevector, Operator) together with the Estimator/Sampler primitives.
qiskit.algorithms was removed from qiskit in 1.0 and split into the standalone qiskit-algorithms package. Install it and import from qiskit_algorithms.
The qiskit.extensions module was removed in 1.0. The operations now live in qiskit.circuit.library (e.g. UnitaryGate, Initialize).
assemble()/Qobj were removed in 1.0. Pass transpiled QuantumCircuits directly to backend.run(); the Qobj intermediate no longer exists.
The QuantumCircuit.qasm() / Instruction.qasm() methods were removed in 1.0. Use qiskit.qasm2.dumps(circuit) / qiskit.qasm2.dump(circuit, file).
The pulse module was removed in Qiskit 2.0. There is no in-tree replacement; pulse-level programming moved out of core Qiskit. Code relying on qiskit.pulse cannot run on Qiskit 2.x.
qiskit.IBMQ was removed. Use the qiskit-ibm-runtime package: from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService.
qiskit.tools (including job_monitor and parallel_map) was removed in 1.0. Poll job.status()/job.result() directly.
Snapshot fake backends (FakeProvider, FakeVigo, FakeTokyo, ...) were removed/reorganized. Use GenericBackendV2 to build a configurable fake backend.
Bare execute(circuit, backend) (imported from qiskit) was removed in 1.0. Use transpile(circuit, backend) then backend.run(transpiled), or the Sampler/Estimator primitives.

QuantumInstance was removed in 1.0. Algorithms now take primitives directly: use the Sampler/Estimator primitives (e.g. StatevectorSampler, StatevectorEstimator) instead of wrapping a backend in a QuantumInstance.

qiskit.aqua was removed during the metapackage dismantling (well before 1.0). Its contents split into application packages (qiskit-nature/optimization/machine-learning/finance); general algorithms now live in the standalone qiskit-algorithms package.

qiskit.ignis was removed during the metapackage dismantling. Characterization, verification and error-mitigation tooling moved to the standalone qiskit-experiments package (and mthree for measurement mitigation).
Importing from qiskit.providers.aer is no longer possible in 1.0. Install qiskit-aer and import from the top-level qiskit_aer package instead (drop-in): from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator.

The legacy qiskit.test.mock fake backends were removed. Device snapshot fakes moved to qiskit_ibm_runtime.fake_provider; for a configurable Qiskit-native fake use GenericBackendV2 from qiskit.providers.fake_provider.
The qiskit.tools.visualization legacy redirect was removed in 1.0. The visualization module has lived at qiskit.visualization since 0.8.0; update imports accordingly.
qiskit.tools was removed in 1.0; parallel_map was relocated to qiskit.utils. Import it as: from qiskit.utils import parallel_map.
The QuantumCircuit.cnot() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.cx() to append a controlled-X gate.
The QuantumCircuit.toffoli() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.ccx() (controlled-controlled-X).
The QuantumCircuit.mct() alias (multi-controlled Toffoli) was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.mcx().
The QuantumCircuit.fredkin() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.cswap() (controlled-SWAP).
QuantumCircuit.snapshot() and the Snapshot instruction were removed in 1.0. Use qiskit-aer's save instructions instead, e.g. QuantumCircuit.save_statevector() after importing qiskit_aer.
PauliTable (and StabilizerTable) were deprecated in 0.43 and removed in 1.0. Use PauliList from qiskit.quantum_info instead.
